creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Joseph Mingrone from comment #37)

Don't worry, it happens, I also forget things sometimes. Indeed, we have three commits on lang/gcc11 instead of one because I had forgotten that I had set DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=gcc=12 in my make.conf, so that, when I tested editors/emacs the first time, I did it with the wrong version of GCC...
